title: Grass factory – from meadow grass to innovative materials
description: A practice abstract detailing Biowert’s grass factory process that converts regional meadow grass into innovative biobased thermoplastic materials using green electricity and an integrated biogas plant. It highlights the development of AgriPlast with up to 75% cellulose content, a closed-loop recycling process, and the production of biofertilizer to support local farmers and sustainable agriculture.
